post.description: Activates a non-banned employer account.
Transitions employer account into banned state.
Soft deletes employer and all users scoped to the employer.
Returns cached employer detail read model by primary key.
Returns full employer profile detail with locations and supervisor list.
Returns filtered employer rows with paging options.
Returns commission policy detail read model by employer id.
Returns accepted volume and estimated commission amounts for the given employer.
Returns active employers ordered by monetization estimate metrics.
Returns CSV package payload for employer commission policy records.
Creates or returns existing commission receivable id for the same employer and period.
Creates or returns existing worker payout row for a checked-out assignment.
Employer marks payout as paid and waits for worker confirmation.
Marks payout as failed and increments retry counter.
Moves failed payout back to pending when retry threshold allows.
Returns commission receivable detail row for employer and billing period.
Returns commission receivable list for the given employer and row limit.
Suspends an employer account when policy allows.
Sets commission rate for monetization policy management.
Accepts a pending application when capacity allows.
Lists applications for a posting; JWT employer_id must match posting owner.
Lists applications created by the authenticated worker.
Rejects an application; optional reason on the command body.
Submits a worker application to an open posting.
Withdraws a pending application for the posting.
Adds a required skill row to the posting, or returns existing row when the same tag already exists.
Transitions a cancellable posting to cancelled state.
Marks an open or filled posting as completed.
Creates a draft posting for an active employer and location.
Returns posting detail including skill tags and application counts.
Requires Bearer JWT with a positive employer_id claim; request body may be `{}` — employer scope is taken only from the token.
Returns postings currently open for applications.
Ranks open postings by cosine similarity between authenticated worker embedding and posting description embedding.
Publishes a draft posting so workers can apply.
Removes a skill row from the posting by skill id.

put.description: Updates editable fields on a draft posting.

post.description: Creates (or returns existing) assignment row for an accepted job application.
Marks assignment as checked-in when token hash matches and worker owns assignment.
Completes mutual QR check-in when employer/supervisor confirms assignment check-in token.
Marks assignment as checked-out when authenticated worker owns the assignment.
Lists assignments created for the authenticated worker.
Returns counters such as total system users, pending approvals, and users activated today.
Returns overdue job posting count and pending application count for scheduler/reporting checks.
Returns a CSV package payload for overdue alarms report export.
Returns accepted application volume, active employer count, and estimated commission metrics.
Re-enables a system user group for authorization evaluations.
Adds or updates permission effect row for a system user group.
Disables a system user group so it no longer contributes rules.
Returns filtered system-user-group rows by active/system flags and name search.
Bans the target account and revokes active refresh tokens.
Rotates password hash and salt for the target account.
Reactivates a previously banned system user account.
Creates a new admin system user and attaches to default admin group when present.
Creates employer system user, employer aggregate, and default active supervisor link.
Creates worker system user and linked worker profile row.
Authenticates credentials and returns JWT access token with refresh token.
Returns profile information for the currently authenticated user derived from JWT claims.
Returns filtered system-user rows by type, account status, and email.
Revokes the provided active refresh token for the given device session.
Validates refresh token for the device session and issues a fresh token pair.
Stores token hash and expiry for the user identified in the command body.
Suspends a non-banned system user account.
Activates account when token hash and expiry are valid for the user in the command body.
Adds a normalized skill tag to the worker profile.
Soft deletes worker and its linked system user.
Returns worker detail model including normalized skill tags.
Returns full worker profile detail with account summary and all profile collections.
Returns filtered worker rows with account status and email filters.
Builds notification preview for the authenticated worker and falls back to email when push token is missing.
Worker confirms payout transfer and closes payout lifecycle.
Updates nationality and university fields for the authenticated worker.
